electrical_constraints._clause_citation: BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 §722 + §411.3.3 + IET Code of Practice for EV Charging Equipment Installation (4th Edition)
electrical_constraints._derivation_note: EV charge point dedicated-circuit constraint per §722 + IET CoP 4th Ed. The §722 top-level (no sub-clauses transcribed) plus §411.3.3 mandate a 30 mA RCD upstream of every EV charge point. The IET CoP 4th Ed dedicated-circuit rule forbids shared loads on the EV circuit. The §722.531.3.101 boundary permits Type A upstream iff the BS EN 61851-1 charging unit provides integral DC residual detection ≥6 mA; otherwise Type B is required. Constraint extended with EV-specific fields per additionalProperties:true on the constraints schema.

assumptions: Cascade producer-side fixture for the small-power C.3 consumer example (uk-ev-charge-domestic). §722 EV charge point is NOT zonal like §701/§702/§703/§710/§715 — no spatial zone is derived. The cascade carries a single rcd_blanket_by_room electrical_constraint extended with EV-specific dedicated-circuit + DC-detection + IP fields (additionalProperties:true on the constraints schema).

anchor_fixtures[] is intentionally empty — the §722 EV charge point is wall-mounted equipment, not a §701/§702/§703/§710 zone-deriving anchor. The existing_fixtures_audit[] carries 1 ev_charge_point_socket_outlet consumed from the upstream small-power C03 dedicated radial (BS EN 62196 Type 2 Mennekes socket; BS EN 61851-1 charging unit with integral 6 mA DC residual detection).

Driveway modelled as 5000 × 3000 mm rectangle (matches the small-power C.3 input.json room_briefs.driveway dimensions). room_type='external_landscape' is the Part-7 enum trigger forcing the consumer's allOf clause requiring consumed_intents.special_locations_zoning.

ambient_temperature_c=20 °C declared at producer level (consistent with a UK driveway external installation). is_external=true; is_wet_room=false. The §722 charge point is exposed to weather but is not classified as a wet location for IPx7-style submersion — IP54 weather-protected enclosure is the §722 minimum carried in the cascade constraint.

EV-specific constraint fields: dedicated_circuit_required=true (IET CoP 4th Ed dedicated-circuit rule), mode_required=3 (AC charge point Mode 3 per BS EN 61851-1), charging_unit_standard='BS EN 61851-1', socket_standard='BS EN 62196 Type 2 Mennekes', upstream_rcd_type_min='A' (the §722.531.3.101 boundary at 6 mA DC detection permits Type A), charging_unit_dc_detection_a_min=6 (right on the §722.531.3.101 boundary — engineer-of-record commissioning check verifies the manufacturer's declared 6 mA against the on-site product datasheet), diversity_factor=1.0 (no off-peak coincidence credit at domestic 7.4 kW single-phase), outdoor_ip_rating_min='IP54'.

Producer-side intent-out.json's special_locations_zoning block is byte-identical to the payload inlined at C.3-ship in electrical/small-power/examples/uk-ev-charge-domestic/output.json consumed_intents.special_locations_zoning.payload — verified by Python dict equality at D.1 ship.

invariants.evidence: 0 anchors produce 0 zones — §722 EV charge point is NOT zonal like §701/§702/§703/§710/§715. anchor_fixtures[] empty; zones[] empty. No overlap to declare. Catalogue self-consistency trivially holds (0=0).

existing_fixtures_audit[] has 1 entry (ev_socket_1 consumed from upstream small-power C03 dedicated radial), compliance_status=compliant. non_compliance_flags[] is empty. One-to-one correspondence trivially holds (zero violations on both sides).
No medical_envelope_group_2 zone present (zones[] empty). §710 medical IT system constraint N/A. INV-03 vacuously PASSes.

room_type='external_landscape', not bathroom/shower_room/sauna. §701.411.3.3 + §703.411.3.3 RCD blanket N/A. The rcd_blanket_by_room constraint emitted here is the §722 EV-specific carve-out (not the §701/§703 blanket). INV-04 vacuously PASSes per spec §7.2.
Not a swimming_pool_hall. §702.415.1 main equipotential bonding N/A.
No bath_tray or whirlpool_pump anchor. §701.512.2 whirlpool pump N/A.

No elv_luminaire anchor present. §715 elv_separation N/A. The driveway is external (is_external=true) but no ELV bollard / SELV lighting circuit is in scope — the EV charge point is at 230 V LV not SELV.

1 fixture audited: ev_socket_1 (ev_charge_point_socket_outlet, IP54, 230 V) at (4800, 1500, 1200). zones[] is empty, so derived_zone_id=null and zone-based sub-rule checks are vacuous: (a) type_prohibited N/A (no zone to prohibit against); (b) ip_below_min N/A (no zone IP minimum); (c) switch_distance_too_close N/A; (d) voltage_above_max N/A. Constraint-level check: the rcd_blanket_by_room constraint with applies_to_room_polygon=true applies to every fixture in the room polygon — ev_socket_1's IP54 ≥ outdoor_ip_rating_min IP54 PASS; constraint's dedicated_circuit_required=true is enforced at the upstream small-power circuit level (C03 dedicated_radial topology + ev_charge_metadata.dedicated_circuit=true). PASS.

anchor_fixtures[] is empty — no anchor provenance to gate. anchor_source_summary records all_extracted=true and extraction_source_lowest='architectural_drawing_extraction' as the safe default for an empty anchor set (per spec §5.5 the rollup is well-defined on empty anchors).
compliant=true ∧ violation_count_critical=0 ∧ violation_count_high=0 ∧ non_compliance_flags=[] ∧ no silent zone overlaps (0 zones). Self-consistency holds.

rationale.chat_summary: D.1 producer-side cascade fixture for small-power C.3 (uk-ev-charge-domestic). Driveway 5000×3000mm modelled as room_type='external_landscape' (Part-7 enum trigger). §722 EV is NOT zonal — 0 zones derived. 1 rcd_blanket_by_room constraint with EV-specific dedicated-circuit + DC-detection + IP54 fields cascaded to small-power. Producer intent-out.special_locations_zoning byte-identical to C.3-ship inlined payload. All 10 INVs PASS.

sections.title: Cascade context
sections.summary: D.1 producer-side fixture closing the integrity loop for the small-power C.3 example (uk-ev-charge-domestic). At C.3-ship the consumer INLINED its consumed_intents.special_locations_zoning.payload with the cascade payload because the producer fixture did not yet exist (DEFERRED-POINTER state honest-disclosed at C.3-ship). D.1 emits the producer-side intent-out.json byte-identical to that inlined payload — verified by Python dict equality at D.1 ship. The consumer's _cascade_disclosure block in input.json is updated at D.1-ship to drop the DEFERRED-POINTER language; the source_path now resolves to a real file in the repo.

sections.title: Standards applied
sections.summary: BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 §722 (Electric vehicle charging installations) governs the EV charge point. §722 is NOT zonal in the §701 bath / §702 pool / §703 sauna / §710 medical / §715 ELV sense — it is constraint-only. §411.3.3 mandates a 30 mA RCD upstream. §722.531.3.101 permits Type A upstream iff the BS EN 61851-1 charging unit provides integral DC residual detection ≥6 mA; otherwise Type B is required. IET Code of Practice for EV Charging Equipment Installation (4th Edition) supplies the dedicated-circuit rule, the BS EN 62196 Type 2 Mennekes socket convention, the IP54 outdoor minimum, and the diversity-factor=1.0 (no off-peak coincidence credit at domestic single-phase 7.4 kW).

sections.title: Zone derivation (empty)
sections.summary: anchor_fixtures[] is EMPTY because the §722 EV charge point is wall-mounted equipment, not a §701/§702/§703/§710 zone-deriving anchor. zones[] is therefore empty. The Part-7 enum trigger for the consumer's allOf clause fires on room_type='external_landscape' regardless of zone-derivation outcome — the trigger is room-type-driven, not zone-driven. existing_fixtures_audit[] carries 1 entry (ev_socket_1) consumed from the upstream small-power C03 dedicated radial; derived_zone_id=null because no zone exists to contain it; compliance_status=compliant.

sections.title: Electrical constraint (rcd_blanket_by_room EV-extended)
sections.summary: 1 electrical_constraint of type rcd_blanket_by_room with applies_to_room_polygon=true. Extended fields per additionalProperties:true on the constraints schema: dedicated_circuit_required=true (IET CoP 4th Ed dedicated-circuit rule), mode_required=3 (AC charge point Mode 3 per BS EN 61851-1), charging_unit_standard='BS EN 61851-1', socket_standard='BS EN 62196 Type 2 Mennekes', upstream_rcd_type_min='A' (Type A boundary at 6 mA DC detection), charging_unit_dc_detection_a_min=6 (right on the §722.531.3.101 boundary — engineer-of-record commissioning check verifies the manufacturer-declared value against the on-site product datasheet), diversity_factor=1.0 (no off-peak coincidence credit), outdoor_ip_rating_min='IP54'. The constraint is the cascade payload the small-power consumer reads at INV-12 sub-checks 2-4.

sections.title: Consumer-side hand-off (small-power INV-12)
sections.summary: When small-power v2.0 consumes this intent: sub-check 1 PASS (consumed_intents.special_locations_zoning present); sub-check 2 PASS (payload.compliant=true, zone_count=0, constraint_count=1, all violation counts 0); sub-check 3 PASS (the single EV socket BS_EN_62196_Type_2_Mennekes_socket_32A_AC does NOT sit inside any zone — zone_count=0 makes zone-containment vacuous; the cascade constraint applies to the room polygon and the IP rating + dedicated_circuit + DC-detection requirements are met by the small-power C03 dedicated radial topology + ev_charge_metadata block); sub-check 4 PASS (payload.non_compliance_flags=[]; nothing to cascade).

sections.title: Honest disclosures
sections.summary: (1) anchor_fixtures[] empty is intentional and schema-permitted (minItems=0 on the IR's anchor_fixtures array and on the intent payload's zones array). (2) The 6 mA DC residual detection value sits EXACTLY on the §722.531.3.101 Type A boundary; the manufacturer-declared value must be verified against the on-site product datasheet at commissioning — surfaced as a small-power non_compliance_flag severity=info at C.3, not duplicated here at the special-locations IR level (separation of concerns: special-locations emits the constraint envelope, small-power surfaces the borderline-value flag against the as-installed product). (3) anchor_source_summary defaults on the empty anchor set per spec §5.5. (4) Payload byte-equality with C.3-ship inlined payload verified at D.1 ship.
